hero.description: Founded in 2024, Starter exists to help developers build better applications faster. We believe in the power of clean code, beautiful design, and open source collaboration.

story.title:
Driven by passion,
defined by excellence.
story.para1: Our journey began with a simple idea: make web development accessible and enjoyable for everyone. We were tired of bloated frameworks and complex configurations.
story.para2: Today, we are a diverse team of engineers, designers, and thinkers working together to solve complex problems with elegant solutions.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.description: Empowering developers and businesses with elegant, fast, and easy-to-use tools to build exceptional digital products.

vision.title: Our Vision
vision.description: To be the platform of choice for modern developers who value beauty, performance, and user experience in every line of code.

values.title: Our Values
values.subtitle: Principles that guide every decision we make.

passion.title: Passion
passion.description: We love what we do, and it shows in every detail of our products.

collaboration.title: Collaboration
collaboration.description: Working together produces the best results. We believe in the power of solid teams.

innovation.title: Innovation
innovation.description: Always seeking better ways to solve problems and create value.

integrity.title: Integrity
integrity.description: Honesty and transparency are the foundation of every relationship we build.

excellence.title: Excellence
excellence.description: We don't settle for good enough. We always strive for the best.

quality.title: Quality
quality.description: Clean code, beautiful design, and seamless experiences are our standards.

team.title: Meet the Team
team.subtitle: The brilliant minds behind every line of code we write.
team.alex_desc: Visionary leader with 10+ years of experience in SaaS ecosystem development.
team.sarah_desc: Full-stack wizard specialising in building large-scale system architectures.
team.mike_desc: Deeply obsessed with pixel details, smooth UX flows, and accessibility standards.
team.jessica_desc: Creative storyteller helping brands find their unique voice in the digital world.

speed.title: Lightning Fast
speed.description: Optimized performance with sub-100ms load times. Built for global scale with edge infrastructure.

design.title: Modern Design
design.description: Clean, responsive UI that looks professional on any device. Fully customizable components.

security.title: High Security
security.description: End-to-end encryption, multi-factor auth, and SOC2 compliance to protect your data.

features.heading: Key Features
features.subheading: Everything you need to build and scale.
